MedlineCitation.CoiStatement: Conflicts of Interest: The authors have no conflicts of interest to declare.

Reference.Citation: Wykrzykowska JJ, Kraak RP, Hofma SH, et al. Bioresorbable Scaffolds versus Metallic Stents in Routine PCI. N Engl J Med 2017;376:2319-28. 10.1056/NEJMoa1614954
